ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso3c" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "iso2c" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was recorded */,
  "gdp_per_cap_ppp" REAL /* GDP per capita in PPP (Purchasing Power Parity) for the country */,
  "gini" REAL /* GINI coefficient for the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "fiscal_policy" TEXT /* Fiscal policy of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was recorded */,
  "co2_emissions_per_cap" REAL /* CO2 emissions per capita for the country */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in the country's energy mix */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index of the country */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "bordering_countries" TEXT /* Countries that share a border with the country */,
  "coastal_region" TEXT /* Coastal region the country is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the income level belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the income level was recorded */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., High income: OECD, Upper middle income) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, international organization) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the data point was retrieved from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
